judge_reason: Description A claims specific text to the left and right of a barcode ('RRP000PJD9', '8/08/374524') while Description B reads only the number '8/08/374524' for the barcode and provides a substantially different list of visual elements (stamp, handwritten table, 'Closed Section' stamp).
original_image_tags: Vertical barcode on the left side of the label. Text to the left of barcode: "RRP000PJD9". Text to the right of barcode: "8/08/374524".
Partial text visible on the right side of the page, seemingly part of a large departmental header or stamp:
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned FBI document cover sheet with multiple stamps and labels, including “U.S. Department of Justice,” “Bureau of Investigation,” “FBI Central Records Center,” “Copied for FOIPA,” a barcode, and handwritten entries in a FOIPA request log table.*
